Event: Titanic Excavation - Apr 16 2026
Event Date: 16/04/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR404
Emerald Addition Gear

Once in a while, the unit throws grenades at 2 enemy units with the greatest damage. Upon hit, the targets turn into rocks for 4 sec. During this time, they are unable to move, and take 40% more damage. The targets also receive 250000 magic damage every second for the duration. When the effect wears off, the targets explode. The explosion deals 400000 pure damage to the target, and its physical and magic armor are reduced by 25% for 4 sec. Rocks are also launched at 2 nearest enemy units. When the rocks hit, they deal 300000 physical damage to the targets and stun them for 2 sec. When the armor's wearer turns enemy units into rocks, these units are made to explode as well, which deals 300000 physical damage to the targets and all enemy units in a small radius around them, and additional pure damage equal to 100% of the armor wearer's attack.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
